requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety and Voltage Compatibility — SS 553 / SS EN 60335-2-40 and Singapore 230 V 50 Hz Grid
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全与电压兼容性——SS 553 / SS EN 60335-2-40及新加坡230V 50Hz电网
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全與電壓相容性——SS 553 / SS EN 60335-2-40及新加坡230V 50Hz電網

summary.en: Singapore's electrical grid operates at 230 V (single-phase) and 400 V (three-phase) at 50 Hz, with BS 1363 three-pin rectangular-blade plugs as the standard consumer socket. Heat pump and air conditioning equipment must be rated and tested for 230 V / 50 Hz operation. Electrical safety is governed by SS 553 (Code of Practice for Air-Conditioning and Mechanical Ventilation in Buildings) and the product-level standard SS EN 60335-2-40 (safety of household and similar electrical appliances: heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers). Installation must comply with the Singapore Wiring Regulations (SS 638 / CP 5). The Energy Market Authority (EMA) licences electrical installations and inspectors. Products must bear the Singapore SAFETY mark as evidence of SS EN 60335-2-40 conformity following NEA Controlled Goods registration.
summary.zh: 新加坡电网以230V（单相）和400V（三相）、50Hz运行，消费者插座标准为BS 1363三脚矩形插头。热泵和空调设备须额定并测试为230V / 50Hz运行。电气安全依据SS 553（建筑空调与机械通风施工规范）和产品级标准SS EN 60335-2-40（家用和类似用途电器安全：热泵、空调器和除湿机）管理。安装须符合新加坡布线规程（SS 638 / CP 5）。能源市场局（EMA）对电气安装和检查员颁发许可。产品须在NEA受管制商品注册后加贴新加坡SAFETY标志，以证明符合SS EN 60335-2-40。
summary.zht: 新加坡電網以230V（單相）和400V（三相）、50Hz運行，消費者插座標準為BS 1363三腳矩形插頭。熱泵和空調設備須額定並測試為230V / 50Hz運行。電氣安全依據SS 553（建築空調與機械通風施工規範）和產品級標準SS EN 60335-2-40（家用和類似用途電器安全：熱泵、空調器和除濕機）管理。安裝須符合新加坡佈線規程（SS 638 / CP 5）。能源市場局（EMA）對電氣安裝和檢查員頒發許可。產品須在NEA受管制商品註冊後加貼新加坡SAFETY標誌，以證明符合SS EN 60335-2-40。

standards_or_laws: SS 553: 2016 — Code of Practice for Air-Conditioning and Mechanical Ventilation in Buildings
SS EN 60335-2-40 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances: particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers
SS 638 / CP 5 — Singapore Wiring Regulations (electrical installation)
EMA Electricity Act — licensing of electrical installations
BS 1363 — UK/Singapore standard 13 A plug and socket-outlet

summary.en: China's electrical grid operates at 220 V (single-phase), 380 V (three-phase), 50 Hz, with Chinese GB 2099 plugs (two or three flat-blade pins). Heat pump and air conditioning safety is governed by GB 4706.32 under the CCC mandatory certification regime. The 50 Hz frequency is the same as Singapore; the nominal voltage difference (220 V vs 230 V, within IEC tolerance) is generally compatible for modern inverter-driven heat pumps, but the product must be rated for 230 V operation and tested accordingly for Singapore compliance. Chinese plugs are not compatible with Singapore BS 1363 sockets and must be changed for the Singapore market.
summary.zh: 中国电网以220V（单相）、380V（三相）、50Hz运行，使用中国GB 2099插头（两脚或三脚扁插头）。热泵和空调安全依据CCC强制认证制度下的GB 4706.32管理。50Hz频率与新加坡相同；额定电压差异（220V与230V，在IEC容差内）对现代变频热泵通常兼容，但产品须额定为230V运行并按新加坡合规要求进行相应测试。中国插头与新加坡BS 1363插座不兼容，新加坡市场须更换。
summary.zht: 中國電網以220V（單相）、380V（三相）、50Hz運行，使用中國GB 2099插頭（兩腳或三腳扁插頭）。熱泵和空調安全依據CCC強制認證制度下的GB 4706.32管理。50Hz頻率與新加坡相同；額定電壓差異（220V與230V，在IEC容差內）對現代變頻熱泵通常相容，但產品須額定為230V運行並按新加坡合規要求進行相應測試。中國插頭與新加坡BS 1363插座不相容，新加坡市場須更換。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.32 — Household and similar electrical appliances: safety for heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers
GB 4343.1 — Household electrical appliances: radio disturbance characteristics
GB 2099 — Plugs and socket-outlets for household and similar purposes

gap.en: China 220 V CCC test evidence does not satisfy Singapore SS EN 60335-2-40 / NEA Controlled Goods registration requirements. The product must be rated for 230 V 50 Hz operation (50 Hz is shared; 10 V nominal difference is generally within IEC tolerance for inverter units but must be confirmed in the test report). Chinese GB 2099 plugs must be replaced with BS 1363 plugs for Singapore. Installation must comply with SS 638 / CP 5 and be carried out by EMA-licensed electrical workers. SAFETY mark placement and bilingual or English labelling obligations under NEA must be met.
gap.zh: 中国220V CCC测试证据不满足新加坡SS EN 60335-2-40 / NEA受管制商品注册要求。产品须额定为230V 50Hz运行（50Hz相同；10V额定电压差对变频机组通常在IEC容差内，但须在测试报告中确认）。中国GB 2099插头须更换为适用于新加坡的BS 1363插头。安装须符合SS 638 / CP 5，并由EMA持牌电工承担。须满足NEA下的SAFETY标志标注和双语或英语标签义务。
gap.zht: 中國220V CCC測試證據不滿足新加坡SS EN 60335-2-40 / NEA受管制商品註冊要求。產品須額定為230V 50Hz運行（50Hz相同；10V額定電壓差對變頻機組通常在IEC容差內，但須在測試報告中確認）。中國GB 2099插頭須更換為適用於新加坡的BS 1363插頭。安裝須符合SS 638 / CP 5，並由EMA持牌電工承擔。須滿足NEA下的SAFETY標誌標注和雙語或英語標籤義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SS EN 60335-2-40 conformity required for NEA SAFETY mark; 230 V 50 Hz rating and BS 1363 plug required for Singapore market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic-market products under GB 4706.32 / CCC; not equivalent to Singapore SS EN 60335-2-40 / NEA SAFETY mark

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — SS EN 60335-2-40 conformity (via NEA SAFETY mark registration) is mandatory; CCC / GB 4706.32 evidence is not accepted; plug type must change to BS 1363; 230 V rating and voltage compatibility must be confirmed in test report.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——SS EN 60335-2-40符合性（通过NEA SAFETY标志注册）为强制要求；CCC / GB 4706.32证据不被接受；插头类型须更换为BS 1363；230V额定电压和电压兼容性须在测试报告中确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——SS EN 60335-2-40符合性（通過NEA SAFETY標誌註冊）為強制要求；CCC / GB 4706.32證據不被接受；插頭類型須更換為BS 1363；230V額定電壓和電壓相容性須在測試報告中確認。
